title: Mailchimp vs ActiveCampaign (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Mailchimp vs ActiveCampaign: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between Mailchimp and ActiveCampaign comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Mailchimp is built for beginners and small businesses, while ActiveCampaign targets businesses needing advanced automation and CRM. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_b: Businesses Needing Advanced Automation And Crm

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on beginners and small businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on businesses needing advanced automation and CRM

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Mailchimp wins for beginners and small businesses, while ActiveCampaign is stronger for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Mailchimp starts at a lower price point ($13/mo vs $15/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from ActiveCampaign to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, switching from ActiveCampaign to Mailchimp is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
